allowed_next_action: write implementation plan only after this specification is reviewed
forbidden_directions: Do not add real biological datasets.
Do not add real pathogen models.
Do not add operational host targeting.
Do not claim full theory validation.
Do not upgrade VF-H1, VF-H3, or VF-H4 without separate mechanism-specific evidence.

future_experiment_acceptance_criteria.artifact_risk_requirement: If all valid sweep cells produce identical signal deltas, the result must be flagged as artifact-risk moderate_to_high or worse.
future_experiment_acceptance_criteria.falsification_requirement: If positive signal rate falls below 50 percent or null-control leakage is nonzero, claim expansion must stop.
future_experiment_acceptance_criteria.minimum_clean_sweep_requirement: At least three safe abstract parameters can vary without violating the safe sweep profile.
future_experiment_acceptance_criteria.null_control_requirement: All null controls must have zero ledger_effect_size leakage.
future_experiment_acceptance_criteria.positive_signal_requirement: VF-H2 signal must remain positive in at least 80 percent of valid safe sweep cells.

redesign_goal: Allow a clean safe abstract toy parameter sweep without expanding claims or introducing real biological meaning.

required_engine_changes.acceptance_criterion: The engine can validate a declared safe sweep profile without treating every deviation from v9.1 defaults as invalid.
required_engine_changes.change: Separate safe envelope validation from fixed v9.1 default-value validation.
required_engine_changes.reason: v9.8 showed that some candidate parameter mutations are blocked by fixed toy-value constraints.

required_engine_changes.acceptance_criterion: Every varied parameter is listed with allowed values, safe abstract role, and forbidden biological interpretation.
required_engine_changes.change: Introduce an explicit SafeToySweepProfile object or equivalent configuration layer.
required_engine_changes.reason: Parameter sweep must be intentional, bounded, and auditable rather than ad hoc mutation of ToyEngineConfig.

required_engine_changes.acceptance_criterion: Identical-variant comparisons produce zero ledger_effect_size delta across declared null controls.
required_engine_changes.change: Add null-control templates as first-class experiment checks.
required_engine_changes.reason: v9.8 null controls were clean and must remain mandatory for future sweeps.

required_engine_changes.acceptance_criterion: Reports include distinct delta count, min, max, mean, standard deviation, and artifact-risk verdict.
required_engine_changes.change: Add artifact-risk reporting for constant signals.
required_engine_changes.reason: v9.7 produced a repeated 3.0 signal; a redesign must distinguish robust signal from mechanically fixed artifact.

required_engine_changes.acceptance_criterion: Reports preserve zero counts for real biological datasets, real pathogen simulation, receptor parameters, targeting, wet-lab protocol, infectivity optimization, immune evasion optimization, and host range prediction.
required_engine_changes.change: Keep real biological semantics explicitly prohibited in engine metadata and reports.
required_engine_changes.reason: The project must remain safe abstract toy only.

safe_parameter_registry.must_not_mean: host count, cell count, organism count, population count, or biological entity count
viral load, dose, infection count, particle count, or biological exposure
incubation time, replication cycle, disease progression time, or biological time
environment, lineage, strain, host type, or empirical scenario
exposure route, sample source, patient group, or biological sampling
mutation process, transmission process, replication mechanism, or biological pathway

safe_parameter_registry.allowed_role: abstract symbolic drift randomization seed only
safe_parameter_registry.must_not_mean: immune evasion, antigenic drift, host adaptation, or biological mutation
